name: Koprindo FOX - E2E Intake Publish Risk Orchestrator [Production]

nodes.name: Webhook Intake
nodes.notes: Trigger utama untuk upload manual dari web app atau sistem lain. Bisa kirim binary file CSV/XLSX atau payload JSON dengan records.

nodes.name: Daily Risk Sweep
nodes.notes: Menyapu ulang payment aging dan mismatch sell-in vs sell-out setiap hari pukul 06:00 Asia/Jakarta.

parameters.jsCode:
const now = new Date();
const periodMonth = now.getMonth() + 1;
const periodYear = now.getFullYear();
return [{
  json: {
    triggerMode: 'manual',
    sourceType: 'inventory',
    sourceParty: 'manual_admin',
    channel: 'alfamart',
    periodMonth,
    periodYear,
    fileName: `demo-inventory-${periodYear}-${String(periodMonth).padStart(2, '0')}.json`,
    fileExtension: 'json',
    mimeType: 'application/json',
    fileSizeBytes: 0,
    fileChecksum: `demo|inventory|alfamart|${periodYear}|${periodMonth}`,
    uploadedBy: 'n8n-manual-trigger',
    receivedAt: now.toISOString(),
    inlineRecords: [
      {
        channel: 'alfamart',
        regionCode: 'JABAR',
        branchCode: 'BDG01',
        outletCode: 'ALF-001',
        skuCode: 'FOX-PREMIUM',
        openingStock: 220,
        closingStock: 0,
        stockSnapshotDate: now.toISOString().slice(0, 10)
      },
      {
        channel: 'alfamart',
        regionCode: 'JATIM',
        branchCode: 'SBY01',
        outletCode: 'ALF-923',
        skuCode: 'FOX-ROCKET',
        openingStock: 4100,
        closingStock: 6400,
        stockSnapshotDate: now.toISOString().slice(0, 10)
      },
      {
        channel: 'alfamart',
        regionCode: 'DKI',
        branchCode: 'JKT01',
        outletCode: 'ALF-145',
        skuCode: 'FOX-ZENITH',
        openingStock: 1200,
        closingStock: 980,
        stockSnapshotDate: now.toISOString().slice(0, 10)
      }
    ]
  }
}];

nodes.name: Check Duplicate Batch
nodes.notes: Cek duplicate sederhana berdasarkan source_type + checksum + periode.

nodes.name: Insert Batch And Records
nodes.notes: Menyimpan batch_registry, data_quality_result, dan records ke tabel operasional dalam satu transaksi.

parameters.query:
={{ `SELECT COALESCE(si.period_key, so.period_key) AS period_key,
COALESCE(si.channel, so.channel) AS channel,
COALESCE(si.branch_code, so.branch_code) AS branch_code,
COALESCE(si.outlet_code, so.outlet_code) AS outlet_code,
COALESCE(si.sku_code, so.sku_code) AS sku_code,
SUM(COALESCE(si.qty_sell_in, 0))::numeric AS total_in,
SUM(COALESCE(so.qty_sell_out, 0))::numeric AS total_out
FROM (SELECT * FROM sell_in_record WHERE period_key='${$('Validate And Score').first().json.periodKey}' AND channel='${$('Validate And Score').first().json.channel}') si
FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM sell_out_record WHERE period_key='${$('Validate And Score').first().json.periodKey}' AND channel='${$('Validate And Score').first().json.channel}') so
ON si.period_key = so.period_key
AND si.channel = so.channel
AND si.branch_code = so.branch_code
AND si.outlet_code = so.outlet_code
AND si.sku_code = so.sku_code
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
HAVING SUM(COALESCE(si.qty_sell_in, 0)) > 0;` }}

SELECT invoice_id, due_date, invoice_amount, paid_amount, aging_days, aging_bucket, to_char(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') AS period_key FROM payment_record WHERE payment_status IN ('unpaid', 'partial', 'overdue') AND invoice_amount > paid_amount AND due_date < CURRENT_DATE;

SELECT COALESCE(si.period_key, so.period_key) AS period_key, COALESCE(si.channel, so.channel) AS channel, COALESCE(si.branch_code, so.branch_code) AS branch_code, COALESCE(si.outlet_code, so.outlet_code) AS outlet_code, COALESCE(si.sku_code, so.sku_code) AS sku_code, SUM(COALESCE(si.qty_sell_in, 0))::numeric AS total_in, SUM(COALESCE(so.qty_sell_out, 0))::numeric AS total_out FROM sell_in_record si FULL OUTER JOIN sell_out_record so ON si.period_key = so.period_key AND si.channel = so.channel AND si.branch_code = so.branch_code AND si.outlet_code = so.outlet_code AND si.sku_code = so.sku_code WHERE COALESCE(si.period_key, so.period_key) = to_char(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5 HAVING SUM(COALESCE(si.qty_sell_in, 0)) > 0;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $json.to, type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $json.messageBody } } }}
